sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Announces A
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Nektar Therapeutics (NASDAQ: NKTR) on behalf of investors who purchased shares between February 26, 2025, and December 15, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Nektar Therapeutics made misrepresentations regarding the Phase 2b trial for REZOLVE-AA. Shareholders who sustained losses are encouraged to contact Bernstein Liebhard LLP, with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 5, 2026.

feed.title: Nautilus Biotechnology Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Nautilus Biotechnology (NASDAQ: NAUT) reported its Q1 2026 financial results, highlighting progress towards commercialization through its Iterative Mapping Early Access Program and the appointment of a new VP of Global Sales. The company posted a net loss of $14.7 million, an improvement from the previous year, and ended the quarter with $143.4 million in cash, cash equivalents, and investments. Nautilus is set to host a conference call on April 28, 2026, to discuss these results further.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet Holdings Releases Q1 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings (ZBH) reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, with adjusted diluted earnings per share of $2.09, significantly beating the analyst estimate of $1.86. The company also surpassed revenue forecasts, posting $2.09 billion for the quarter, an increase of 9.3% from the prior year. Management projected adjusted EPS for the full fiscal year 2026 to be between $8.40 and $8.55, reflecting continued execution of its strategy across key markets.

feed.title: Keysight sets May 19 earnings release, replay available for 90 days
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) announced it will release its fiscal second quarter results after the market closes on Tuesday, May 19, 2026. The company will host a conference call and webcast on the same day at 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET) to discuss the results, with a replay available on their investor relations website for 90 days.

feed.title: Hilton: Pipeline Hits 527K Rooms in Q1
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. reported strong financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2026, leading to raised full-year expectations. The company saw a 3.6% increase in RevPAR, expanded its development pipeline to 527,000 rooms, and added 16,300 new rooms to its system. Hilton also introduced a new brand, Select by Hilton, and returned $860 million to shareholders during the quarter.

feed.title: Sysco Corp. (SYY) Misses Q3 EPS by 1c; offers guidance
feed.summary: Sysco Corp. (SYY) reported Q3 EPS of $0.94, missing analyst estimates by $0.01, with revenue of $20.5 billion, slightly below the consensus of $20.55 billion. The company provided guidance for FY2026 EPS in the range of $4.50-$4.60, which aligns with the analyst consensus of $4.59.

feed.title: PPG taps Avient CFO Jamie Beggs to succeed Vince Morales
feed.summary: PPG (NYSE: PPG) has announced the appointment of Jamie A. Beggs as its new senior vice president and chief financial officer (CFO), effective July 6. Beggs, who previously served as CFO of Avient Corporation, will succeed Vincent J. Morales, who is retiring after a 41-year career with PPG. She will report to PPG chairman and CEO Timothy M. Knavish and will also oversee corporate development and information technology.

feed.title: Strategic Blueprint LLC Sells 17,491 Shares of Delta Air Lines, Inc. $DAL
feed.summary: Strategic Blueprint LLC significantly reduced its stake in Delta Air Lines by 17.7% in Q4, selling 17,491 shares and retaining 81,288 shares valued at $5.64 million. This divestment comes amidst notable insider selling from Delta executives. Despite these sales, Delta surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue expectations and declared a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Company $BMY Shares Sold by Skylands Capital LLC
feed.summary: Skylands Capital LLC reduced its stake in Bristol Myers Squibb by 11.4% (18,400 shares) and EVP David V. Elkins sold 30,000 shares, decreasing his ownership by 15.85%. Despite beating revenue estimates, BMS missed EPS expectations for the quarter but set optimistic FY2026 EPS guidance and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.63 per share. Institutional investors now own 76.41% of the company's stock.

feed.title: FengHe Fund Management Pte. Ltd. Reduces Stake in Analog Devices, Inc. $ADI
feed.summary: FengHe Fund Management Pte. Ltd. significantly reduced its stake in Analog Devices, Inc. by 71.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 143,700 shares and now holding 58,200 shares valued at $15.78 million. Despite this, other institutional investors have increased their holdings, and Analog Devices reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS estimates, increasing revenue by 30.4% year-over-year, and raising its quarterly dividend. Insider selling has also occurred, with transactions by CAO Michael Sondel and CEO Vincent Roche totaling over $8.7 million in sales.

feed.title: FengHe Fund Management Pte. Ltd. Invests $44.25 Million in Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK
feed.summary: FengHe Fund Management Pte. Ltd. has acquired a new position in Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK), purchasing 420,400 shares valued at approximately $44.25 million during the fourth quarter, making it their 16th largest holding. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their stakes in Merck, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $128.47. The article also details recent positive and neutral sentiment news related to Merck's regulatory successes, strong earnings history, and public health initiatives, alongside recent insider selling activity.

feed.title: FengHe Fund Management Pte. Ltd. Purchases Shares of 529,326 MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc. $MTSI
feed.summary: FengHe Fund Management Pte. Ltd. recently acquired a new stake of 529,326 shares in MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:MTSI) during the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $90.66 million. This investment now represents 5.1% of FengHe Fund Management's portfolio, making MACOM Technology Solutions its seventh-largest holding. Other institutional investors also increased their stakes in the semiconductor company.

feed.title: Sysco Reports Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results
feed.summary: Sysco Corporation announced strong financial results for its third fiscal quarter ended March 28, 2026, with sales increasing 4.7% to $20.5 billion and gross profit growing 6.5% to $3.8 billion. The company saw significant acceleration in U.S. local case volume, up 3.3%, and is on track to deliver full-year adjusted EPS at the high end of its guidance range. Sysco also detailed its recent agreement to acquire Jetro Restaurant Depot, pending regulatory review.

feed.title: Jun Jiang becomes CFO of Jinxin Technology Holding (NAMI)
feed.summary: Jinxin Technology Holding Company (NAMI) has formally appointed Jun Jiang as its Chief Financial Officer, effective immediately. Jiang previously served as a director, chief operating officer, and interim CFO, so this move solidifies his leadership in the company's finance department. The announcement was made via a Form 6-K SEC filing, indicating an internal promotion that formalizes existing responsibilities.

feed.title: FengHe Fund Management Pte. Ltd. Invests $79.41 Million in L3Harris Technologies Inc $LHX
feed.summary: FengHe Fund Management Pte. Ltd. has acquired a new position in L3Harris Technologies Inc (NYSE:LHX) worth approximately $79.41 million, making it their ninth largest holding. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their stakes in the company. Insiders have recently sold shares, while analyst ratings suggest a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a price target of $349.55.

feed.title: Jacobs Solutions (J) to Release Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J) is scheduled to release its Q2 2026 earnings before market open on Tuesday, May 5th, with analysts anticipating earnings of $1.64 per share on $2.2797 billion in revenue. The company recently reported $1.53 EPS for the previous quarter, exceeding estimates, and has increased its quarterly dividend to $0.36 per share. Several analysts have updated their ratings and price targets for Jacobs Solutions, resulting in a current consensus of "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $154.60.

feed.title: Corteva Quarterly Dividend Set at $0.18 a Share | CTVA Stock News
feed.summary: Corteva (NYSE: CTVA) has declared a quarterly common-stock dividend of $0.18 per share, payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026. Additionally, its wholly-owned subsidiary, EIDP, Inc., announced preferred dividends of $1.125 and $0.875 per share, payable on July 24, 2026, to holders of record on July 2, 2026. This announcement highlights Corteva's commitment to returning value to its shareholders and provides specific dates for dividend payments.

feed.title: Truck dispatchers can now pull and rank DAT loads inside PCS
feed.summary: PCS Software has integrated the DAT One load board directly into its Cortex Opportunity Manager and Backhaul Booster, allowing dispatchers to source, score, and rank DAT loads based on profitability logic within a single platform. This integration aims to streamline freight matching, reduce manual entry, and improve profitability for carriers. The feature is immediately available to users with both Cortex and DAT One subscriptions.

feed.title: Skyworks packs power and 150 Mbps data isolation into one chip
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) has introduced the Si86Px family of digital isolators, integrating signal isolation with an isolated DC-DC converter and miniature transformer. This compact solution delivers up to 0.5W of isolated power, supports data rates up to 150 Mbps, and features industry-leading 0.1% load regulation, making it suitable for space-constrained industrial and automotive applications. The new isolators simplify design, reduce board area and bill of material (BOM) count, and are now available for purchase.

feed.title: Skyworks Introduces Si86Px Digital Isolators with Integrated Power for Space‑Constrained Industrial Designs
feed.summary: Skyworks has launched its new Si86Px family of digital isolators, which integrate high-performance digital isolation with an isolated dc-dc converter and miniature transformer. This compact solution aims to simplify isolated system design, reduce PCB area and bill of materials for industrial and automotive applications, and deliver industry-leading load regulation and high data rates. The Si86Px family is now available.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts First Solar PT to $230 From $275, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has adjusted its price target for First Solar (FSLR) to $230 from $275, while maintaining an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst revisions for First Solar, indicating a general re-evaluation of the company's valuation. The article also provides recent news and company profile details for First Solar.

feed.title: Sales hit $4.1B as Ecolab sticks with 2026 profit forecast
feed.summary: Ecolab reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with sales reaching $4.1 billion and adjusted diluted EPS increasing by 13%. The company maintained its 2026 adjusted diluted EPS outlook of $8.43 to $8.63, reflecting continued confidence despite rising commodity costs which it plans to offset through accelerated pricing and productivity. Growth was driven by accelerated organic sales, particularly in Life Sciences and Global High-Tech.

feed.title: New York event: Thermo Fisher executives take questions May 20
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE: TMO) will host its 2026 Investor Day on May 20, 2026, in New York City, featuring presentations from senior management and a Q&A session. A live webcast of the event will be available on the company's investor relations website. Thermo Fisher Scientific, a global leader in serving science with over $45 billion in annual revenue, is dedicated to enabling customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer.

feed.title: S&P Global trades higher even as 2026 revenue guidance revised down (SPGI:NYSE)
feed.summary: S&P Global (SPGI) saw its shares trade higher in pre-market, up 1.01% to $441.69, after first-quarter earnings surpassed analyst expectations. This positive stock movement occurred despite the company revising down its full-year 2026 revenue guidance. S&P Global is notably known for the S&P 500 index.

feed.title: Embraer honors Pratt & Whitney as full E2 engine availability targets year-end
feed.summary: Pratt & Whitney, an RTX business, has been named Embraer's 2026 Best Supplier of the Year in the "Outstanding Collaboration" category for its support of PW1900G-powered E2 aircraft. The company anticipates full engine availability for the Embraer E2 fleet by the end of the year and is enhancing GTF MRO capacity while integrating GTF Advantage hot section technologies into PW1900G engines to improve durability. This recognition highlights the long-standing partnership and commitment to operational excellence.

feed.title: PACCAR Achieves Good Financial Performance – Company Announcement
feed.summary: PACCAR reported good revenues and increased net income in the first quarter of 2026, driven by strong performance in PACCAR Parts and Financial Services. The company achieved quarterly revenues of $6.78 billion and net income of $605.3 million ($1.15 per diluted share). PACCAR also introduced new truck models and expanded its battery-electric vehicle offerings, while making significant investments in capital projects and research and development for future growth.

feed.title: Apple Grandmaster Tim Cook Is Playing 3D Chess With AI
feed.summary: This article praises Tim Cook's strategic leadership at Apple, particularly concerning the company's approach to AI. Despite criticisms about Apple's lagging AI performance and Cook's impending departure, the author argues that Cook's focus on the iPhone as a "choke point" in consumer technology has been a deliberate and highly successful strategy, allowing Apple to accumulate significant value and optionality. The article likens Cook's strategy to playing "3D chess," prioritizing Apple's core strengths and profitability over a potentially undominatable AI race.

feed.title: AbbVie Submits Application to FDA for Upadacitinib (RINVOQ®) for Adults and Adolescents with Severe Alopecia Areata
feed.summary: AbbVie has submitted an application to the FDA for upadacitinib (RINVOQ) to treat severe alopecia areata in adults and adolescents, supported by positive data from its Phase 3 UP-AA clinical trials. The studies demonstrated significant scalp hair regrowth at week 24, with further improvements observed through week 52, and a safety profile consistent with previous findings. While the drug is not yet approved for this indication, this submission marks a crucial step in potentially expanding RINVOQ's use.

feed.title: KKR hires economist Lauren Goodwin to build tools for financial advisors
feed.summary: KKR has appointed Lauren Goodwin as Managing Director and Chief Investment Strategist for its Global Wealth Solutions business. She will focus on creating practical tools and adapting KKR's market insights for financial advisors, including wirehouses, RIAs, and private banks. Goodwin's role strengthens KKR's commitment to providing advisors with resources to incorporate private markets into client portfolios.

feed.title: KTF Investments LLC Buys Shares of 32,048 United Rentals, Inc. $URI
feed.summary: KTF Investments LLC has acquired a new stake of 32,048 shares in United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE:URI), valued at approximately $25.94 million, making it a significant holding in their portfolio. This comes despite United Rentals missing Q1 earnings estimates, though the company authorized a $5.0 billion share buyback and declared a $1.97 quarterly dividend. Insider selling by CEO Matthew Flannery and other executives has also been noted, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the stock.

feed.title: Chipotle hires a new chief brand officer as it looks to boost guest loyalty (CMG:NYSE)
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) has appointed Fernando Machado as its new Chief Brand Officer, effective June 1. Machado will be responsible for global marketing, brand positioning, and customer engagement. This move aligns with Chipotle's "Recipe for Growth" strategy and international expansion plans.

feed.title: KTF Investments LLC Acquires Shares of 165,885 Modine Manufacturing Company $MOD
feed.summary: KTF Investments LLC has acquired 165,885 shares of Modine Manufacturing Company (NYSE:MOD), making it the fund's eighth-largest holding and representing 0.32% of Modine Manufacturing. This acquisition, valued at approximately $22.15 million, underscores KTF's significant investment in the auto parts company. Modine recently reported strong Q4 earnings, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: SLB Launches Breakthrough Reservoir Mapping Solution
feed.summary: SLB has introduced AlphaSight™, a new reservoir mapping and drilling intelligence solution designed to enhance real-time subsurface visibility and control in complex drilling environments. This technology allows operators to make more confident drilling decisions, improve well placement, and maximize production potential without compromising performance. AlphaSight has been field-proven across various regions, contributing to stronger asset productivity and accelerating the transition toward digital and autonomous drilling operations.

feed.title: General Mills Hosts FDTI Workshop: Top Global Organizations Explored 'Growing CFO Leaders, Powered by AI’
feed.summary: General Mills recently hosted a Finance Development & Training Institute (FDTI) Alliance Workshop at its Minneapolis headquarters, where member companies discussed how AI is transforming finance talent development. The workshop focused on building CFO-ready leaders, integrating AI fluency within finance teams, and fostering cohesive global finance operations. Attendees included major global organizations like The Coca-Cola Company, Dell Technologies, and IBM, alongside guests such as Netflix and UnitedHealth Group, all collaborating to navigate the future of finance leadership.

feed.title: SLB Q1 2026 net income slips 6% to $752m
feed.summary: SLB (formerly Schlumberger) announced its Q1 2026 financial results, reporting a 6% decrease in net income to $752 million. This indicates a challenging quarter for the oilfield services giant, with specific details on revenue and earnings per share anticipated in the full report.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Real Estate Companies: Gaming and Leisure (GLPI), Prologis (PLD) and Region Group (OtherSCPAF)
feed.summary: Analysts from Truist Financial and Jarden have provided updated ratings and price targets for several real estate companies. Gaming and Leisure (GLPI) received a Buy rating with a $60.00 price target, while Prologis (PLD) also maintained a Buy rating with a $154.00 price target. Region Group (SCPAF) retained a Hold rating with a target of A$2.53.

feed.title: Insulet stock (US45784P1012): Is tubeless insulin delivery strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Insulet, a leader in automated insulin delivery with its Omnipod tubeless pumps, is positioned in the growing global diabetes device market. The company's core business relies on recurring revenue from disposable Pods, and its Omnipod 5 system offers advanced, automated insulin delivery. While facing competition, Insulet's tubeless design and strategic expansion are seen as key growth drivers for investors in the U.S. and English-speaking markets.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Trims Equifax Price Target to $243 From $244, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has adjusted its price target for Equifax (EFX) to $243, a slight reduction from the previous $244. Despite this minor change, the firm has maintained its Overweight rating on the credit reporting agency. This update follows a series of other analyst adjustments for Equifax earlier in the month.

feed.title: Silicone Elastomer Market Is Going to Boom | Dow Inc, Wacker Chemie AG
feed.summary: Worldwide Market Reports has published an in-depth study on the "Silicone Elastomer Market Size and Forecast 2026-2033," covering key manufacturers like Dow Inc. and Wacker Chemie AG. The report provides a data-driven analysis of historical trends, future projections, growth drivers, opportunities, risks, and challenges. It includes SWOT and Porter's Five Forces analysis, competitive landscape details, market segmentation by type and application, and regional coverage.

feed.title: American Tower Q1 earnings top estimates, guidance raised on robust demand for infrastructure (AMT:NYSE)
feed.summary: American Tower (AMT) reported stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings and revenue, leading to a 1.8% rise in its stock during premarket trading. The company also increased its 2026 guidance, citing robust demand for communications infrastructure, positive foreign currency exchange rates, and accelerated revenue in Latin America. Key operational metrics showed growth in total property revenue and an improvement in property gross margin.

feed.title: New director joins lululemon (NASDAQ: LULU) as board refresh continues
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. (NASDAQ: LULU) has appointed Esi Eggleston Bracey, a seasoned consumer-brands executive, to its board of directors, effective April 28, 2026, as part of an ongoing board refresh strategy. Bracey brings over 30 years of global leadership experience from Unilever, Coty, and Procter & Gamble. This appointment, along with the upcoming retirement of two other directors, will lead to the board reducing from 11 to 9 members after the 2026 annual meeting.

feed.title: KTF Investments LLC Takes Position in Synchrony Financial $SYF
feed.summary: KTF Investments LLC acquired a new stake of 47,018 shares in Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) during Q4, valued at approximately $3.92 million. This comes amid significant institutional buying, resulting in institutions owning about 96.48% of the stock, despite insiders being net sellers of 379,928 shares recently. Synchrony Financial reported Q1 EPS of $2.27, beating estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.30, with several analysts setting new price targets for the stock.

feed.title: 18,423 Shares in McGrath RentCorp $MGRC Acquired by KTF Investments LLC
feed.summary: KTF Investments LLC has acquired 18,423 shares of McGrath RentCorp (MGRC) in the fourth quarter, establishing a new stake worth approximately $1.93 million. McGrath RentCorp recently reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with an EPS of $2.02 and revenue of $256.76 million, and also increased its quarterly dividend. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average target price of $141.50.

feed.title: KTF Investments LLC Purchases Shares of 18,151 Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: KTF Investments LLC acquired a new stake of 18,151 shares of Bank of America (BAC) in the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $998,000. Bank of America exceeded Q1 expectations with strong EPS and revenue, and institutional investors collectively own about 70.71% of the company. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target price of $60.90, despite some recent insider selling.

feed.title: KTF Investments LLC Makes New Investment in First Solar, Inc. $FSLR
feed.summary: KTF Investments LLC acquired a new position of 58,985 shares in First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) during the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $15.41 million, making it 2.5% of KTF's total holdings. Despite missing EPS estimates, First Solar reported strong revenue growth and healthy margins in its last quarter. The stock currently holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $243.49.

feed.title: RBC Trims Price Target on Williams-Sonoma to $213 From $214, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets has slightly reduced its price target for Williams-Sonoma (WSM) to $213 from $214, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes despite the bank's continued positive outlook on the home furnishings retailer.

feed.title: Flossbach Von Storch SE Grows Stock Position in Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER
feed.summary: Flossbach Von Storch SE increased its stake in Uber Technologies by 4.9% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 757,668 shares valued at approximately $61.9 million. Institutional investors now collectively own about 80.24% of Uber. Despite missing Q4 EPS estimates, Uber's revenue slightly surpassed expectations, and the company provided Q1 2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Flossbach Von Storch SE Purchases 9,445 Shares of The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: Flossbach Von Storch SE increased its stake in The TJX Companies, Inc. by 8.4%, acquiring an additional 9,445 shares, bringing its total holdings to 121,907 shares valued at $18.73 million. Institutional investors now own 91.09% of TJX. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations, provided strong FY2027 guidance, increased its quarterly dividend, and received several analyst upgrades, resulting in a consensus "Buy" rating.

feed.title: Flossbach Von Storch SE Boosts Stake in Stryker Corporation $SYK
feed.summary: Flossbach Von Storch SE increased its stake in Stryker Corporation by 3.2% in Q4, acquiring an additional 8,823 shares, bringing their total to 284,245 shares valued at approximately $99.9 million. This occurred despite Director Ronda E. Stryker selling 250,000 shares for about $90.73 million in February, reducing her holding by 9.23%. Stryker reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates with $4.47 EPS and $7.17 billion in revenue, declared an $0.88 quarterly dividend, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $421.11.

feed.title: Flossbach Von Storch SE Has $368.26 Million Stock Holdings in S&P Global Inc. $SPGI
feed.summary: Flossbach Von Storch SE reduced its stake in S&P Global Inc. (NYSE:SPGI) by 3.6% in the fourth quarter, now holding 704,687 shares valued at $368.26 million, representing 0.23% of S&P Global and about 1.5% of Flossbach's portfolio. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for S&P Global with an average price target of $558.47, despite the company missing Q4 EPS estimates by $0.02, while beating revenue expectations and setting positive FY2026 guidance. Institutional investors collectively own 87.17% of S&P Global's stock, with several other major firms also adjusting their positions in the company recently.
